a2hs.body: For true full screen: tap <0>Share</0> then <1>“Add to Home Screen”</1>.

notify.loadStateFailed: Could not load the game state.
notify.swapPoolFailed: Could not swap the cards in the pool.
notify.returnCardFailed: Could not remove the card from the board.
notify.allCorrect: Perfect! All cards are correctly placed.
notify.nextBoardFailed: Could not move to the next board.
notify.sessionExpired: Your game session expired while you were away.
notify.kicked: You were removed from the game by the admin.
notify.yourBoardToast: This is your board! Watch the other players.
